text:
Background

Software developer based in Quezon City, Philippines. ~1 year professional experience.
Primary stack: Laravel + Vue.js, Inertia.js as bridge layer. Also worked with ASP.NET WebForms (VB.NET), MS SQL Server.

Current focus

Freelance work alongside full-time employment. Built and deployed a personal Next.js 14 portfolio, currently hosted on AWS EC2.

Overview

Full-featured Laravel + Vue + Inertia.js enrollment and LMS platform built speculatively for a civil engineering board exam review center.

Key features

HLS video transcoding with AES-128 encryption, Cloudflare R2 storage. Installment payment tracking with admin approval workflow. GitHub-contribution-style reporting dashboard (Recharts + shadcn/ui). Batch management with automatic role revocation on batch closure. Discord-style announcement system with emoji reactions. Enrollment email notifications via Resend. Stepped multi-page enrollment form.

Technical challenges solved

FFmpeg transcoding failures on 8GB video files (URL encoding, disk space on Windows/Laragon). Inertia.js reactive state bugs (local ref vs computed from page props).

Overview

Next.js 14 personal portfolio (petermadrid-dev). Includes a GitHub contribution graph component built on the GitHub GraphQL API.

Deployment

AWS EC2, Ubuntu 24.04 LTS. sslip.io for HTTPS without a custom domain. Nginx reverse proxy. PM2 for process management.

Freelance services offered

Full-stack Laravel/Vue/Inertia web apps. LMS and enrollment platforms. Payment tracking systems with admin approval workflows. Video hosting with encrypted HLS streaming. Custom admin dashboards and reporting.

Engagement model

Project-based freelance, scoped after a requirements discussion. Pricing negotiated per project.

Backend

Laravel (controllers, services, form requests, Eloquent), permissions architecture (roles/permissions/pivot), multi-currency FX handling, BIR-compliant accounting logic.

Frontend

Vue.js, Inertia.js, TypeScript, Next.js 14, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Recharts.

Infra

AWS EC2 deployment, Nginx reverse proxy, PM2 process management, sslip.io for HTTPS without a domain, Cloudflare R2 for object storage, HLS video transcoding with FFmpeg + AES-128 encryption.

Database

MySQL, MS SQL Server, HeidiSQL for inspection.
